product_surfaces: CLI repo add command over a temporary SQLite cache
CLI sync command acceptance surface: gitcode-mcp sync --repo <repo_id> --issues --wiki --index
CLI offline read commands: search, get, get-snippet
CLI cache-status JSON command over synced cache
SQLite sync graph persistence for records, comments, aliases, sync events, remote revisions, and chunks
targeted service/cache Go tests for offline sync reads, idempotency replay, and provenance preservation
freshness: current source/build/runtime evidence required; run.sh creates a new temporary SQLite cache, executes the real gitcode-mcp CLI commands from the current checkout, runs targeted Go tests, go test ./..., and git diff --check
mocks_used: sanitized fixture/external-provider data only; live GitCode network and credentials disabled
